title: Uncertainties, dark horses and inflation creeping up
section_path: Uncertainties, dark horses and inflation creeping up
section_path_text: Uncertainties, dark horses and inflation creeping up
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know about this week. Heightened policy uncertainty seems to be affecting US risk assets more than EU risk assets, since the beginning of the year. Meanwhile, investors have to deal with conflicting inflation strategies.
